nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A captivating and alluring portrait of a confident modern witch. She is dressed in stylish yet gothic attire: a dark, velvet form-fitting dress with intricate lace details, layered silver jewelry including a large moon pendant, and many rings. Her dark hair is slightly tousled and falls around her face, adorned with subtle braids and a moon phase hair accessory. She has smokey, intense eye makeup and deep plum lipstick. She is holding an ornate, ancient-looking book of spells (Grimoire) in one hand, which is glowing faintly with a warm, mystical light, and a smoking stick of incense or a crystal wand in the other. She is standing in a dimly lit, cozy alchemy room or forest grove at dusk, with soft candlelight, dried herbs, and bubbling potion bottles blurring in the background. She is looking directly at the camera with a playful and powerful gaze. The lighting is cinematic, atmospheric, and mystical. Digital painting style, highly detailed, photorealistic
